description: Create a multi-mission quest arc in STAR using AI-generated narrative content. Each mission is a STAR holon; the quest holon links them into an ordered arc. Demonstrates OASIS + STAR narrative infrastructure.

steps.description: Create Mission 1 — the opening act. Repeat this step for each mission in the arc (adjust name, description, objectives each time).
steps.repeat: once per mission in the arc

parameters.{mission1Description}: Narrative summary of what happens in this mission (string)
parameters.{mission1Objectives}: Comma-separated objectives the player must complete (string)
parameters.{mission1Trigger}: Condition that starts the mission, e.g. 'player enters casino district' (string)
parameters.{mission1Reward}: What the player gets on completion, e.g. '$5000 cash, access to Meridian contact list' (string)

notes: Requires STAR WebAPI running and Avatar beam-in.
Returns { success: true, data: { id, name, ... } }.
Save each returned mission id — you need all of them for star_create_quest in the final step.
AI-generate the narrative content before calling this tool; pass the output directly as arguments.

example.name: Meridian Recon
example.description: Scope the casino floor, identify guard rotation, and plant a tracking device on the head of security — without raising suspicion.
example.objectives: Enter casino without flagging security, photograph guard rotation schedule, plant tracker on Vasquez
example.triggerCondition: player accepts The Meridian Job quest from fixer contact

steps.description: Create Mission 2 — the middle act. Same shape as step 1, different content.
notes: Populate with the second narrative beat. Save the returned mission id.
The AI should generate content that escalates tension from Mission 1 and sets up Mission 3.

example.name: Crew Assembly
example.description: Track down three specialists: a safecracker, a getaway driver, and a network hacker. Each has conditions before they will work with you.
example.objectives: Recruit safecracker Elena Voss, recruit driver Dario Ruiz, recruit hacker known only as 'Null'
example.rewardDescription: Crew assembled, access to Null's encrypted comms channel

steps.description: Create Mission 3 — the climax. Same shape. Save the returned mission id.

example.name: The Meridian Job
example.description: Execute the heist during the New Year's gala. Get in, reach the vault, and get everyone out before the window closes.
example.objectives: Enter via staff entrance, disable vault alarm, crack the Meridian safe, exit before 02:00
example.triggerCondition: Mission 2 complete and New Year's gala active server event
example.rewardDescription: Meridian Plasma Rifle NFT, $80000 split, STARNET achievement unlock

steps.description: Link all three missions into a single quest arc holon on STAR.

parameters.{questArcSummary}: One-paragraph pitch for what the arc is about (string)
parameters.{mission1Id}: id returned by step 1 star_create_mission call
parameters.{mission2Id}: id returned by step 2 star_create_mission call
parameters.{mission3Id}: id returned by step 3 star_create_mission call

notes: Returns { success: true, data: { id, name, missions: [...], ... } }.
Save the quest id for use in nft-game-item.json (quest completion reward linkage).
The quest arc is now a STARNET holon — other server owners can discover and fork it.

steps.description: Persist the full quest arc structure to workspace.

cli_alternative.description: Single-mission variant using STAR CLI instead of MCP (simpler but no arc linking).

agent_prompt_summary: Use star_create_mission for each mission with AI-generated objectives and rewards, then star_create_quest to link them into an arc. Save the arc to quests/{name}.json.
